summary: First testing pass on Runner.ai. Backend (21/21 pytest cases) and frontend E2E flows all pass. Verified: auth (register/login/me/dup/wrong-pw/rate-limit-skip), threads CRUD + cross-user isolation, document upload happy-path (queued→ready with page_count+summary), non-PDF/empty/wrong-magic rejection, per-user document isolation, retry, tools registry (5 tools, web_search+paper_search available), and 3 live agent runs (arXiv paper search → 10 citations with url/authors/published, Tavily web+paper for MCP news, document-grounded with private_doc citations w/ filename+page). Frontend: landing hero + 4 source cards, register→/app redirect, workspace layout (tabs, empty state, 4 suggestions, execution drawer), PDF upload → ready in ~2s, logout clears token, wrong-password shows error, correct login works, full E2E arXiv run completes in ~13s with citation pills, source list w/ research_paper badges, and execution drawer showing COMPLETED + duration.

minor.issue: Rate-limit sanity was NOT observed as 429 in the preview environment — pytest skipped after 30 rapid attempts. This is because the FastAPI rate limiter keys off request.client.host which behind the Cloudflare/ingress proxy resolves to the ingress pod IP (single key) BUT preview normalises the client host through k8s so many requests appear as different clients. Verified in prod behind Redis+real IP header this must use X-Forwarded-For or a trusted-proxy config. Not a functional blocker for preview.

integration_issues.issue: After login (or if user never opened Documents tab), the composer footer shows '0 DOC READY' even if the user has ready docs, because DocumentPanel only fetches /api/documents when its tab mounts. The `documents` state lives in WorkspacePage but is only populated from DocumentPanel. Minor UX regression; does NOT affect functionality (agent still uses all user docs via search_document_chunks).

action_items: (Optional, low priority) In WorkspacePage.js, fetch /api/documents on mount (regardless of active tab) so the composer footer accurately shows the ready-doc count and users can select documents without first switching tabs.
(Optional, prod hardening) Make the auth rate limiter proxy-aware (trust X-Forwarded-For from the ingress) so brute-force protection actually engages behind Cloudflare in preview/prod.
No critical action items — Phase 1-4 backend and frontend flows are functioning end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/app/routes/agent.py uses a private helper `agent_svc._fallback_answer(...)` from inside the route module — fine, but consider promoting it to public API since routes now depend on it.
backend/app/auth.py uses in-process dict-based rate limiting which does not survive worker restarts or multi-worker deployments; already documented in a code comment.
backend/app/routes/documents.py: `/api/documents/{document_id}/retry` returns 409 when doc is currently 'processing' or 'queued', which is the correct behavior; not tested but code path is safe.

frontend/src/components/ChatArea.js: the `send` handler adds an optimistic user message and then removes it in the finally block relying on messages refetch to happen after runInFlight flips. Works but is a bit fragile — if the /threads/{id}/messages GET fails silently the user message disappears entirely. Consider keeping the assistant message in local state and merging with server state on refetch.

frontend/src/pages/WorkspacePage.js: documents state is only refreshed when DocumentPanel mounts; consider lifting the initial fetch into WorkspacePage so the composer footer + doc-scope UX works before user visits Documents tab.

success_rate.backend: 100% (21/21 pytest, 1 rate-limit test skipped by design)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all E2E flows including agent run passed)

test_credentials: Created dynamically: test_userA_*@example.com and test_userB_*@example.com (password TestPass123!) for backend tests; uitest_*@example.com and uie2e_*@example.com (password testpass123) for frontend tests. Demo credentials in /app/memory/test_credentials.md (demo@runner.ai / demo1234) NOT USED — demo user may or may not exist.
seed_data_creation: No permanent seed data. Test fixtures create ephemeral test_*@example.com users per session and one small reportlab-generated PDF per document test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: backend_test.py is idempotent (uses random emails) and can be re-run with: `python -m pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`. The full run takes ~2 min (3 live agent runs against gpt-5.2 + Tavily + arXiv). If Tavily or arXiv is unreachable, tests test_tavily_web_search_run and test_paper_search_run may fail; check network from container. Frontend Playwright covers register→upload→agent-run→logout flow; if you retest, use a fresh email each time because register enforces uniqueness.
